testcase.name: postBatchtv4

failure.message: expected [{"Batch":{"Success":true,"Data":null,"Messages":[{"Enabled":1,"Info":"Created","Level":1}]}}] but found [{"Batch":{"Success":false,"Data":null,"Messages":[{"Enabled":1,"Info":"Batch Id ( Test Batch 2025 ) already exist.","Level":3}]}}]
